title: Income Tax: Changes to Tax rates for Property, Savings and Dividend Income
body: "These measures will:    increase the dividend ordinary rate to 10.75% and the dividend upper rate to 35.75% from 6 April 2026   increase the savings basic rate to 22%, the savings higher rate to 42% and the savings additional rate to 47% from 6 April 2027   set the tax rates applicable to property income from 6 April 2027 — the property basic rate will be 22%, the property higher rate will be 42% and the property additional rate will be 47%   "
